input.document:
Bill #1
Date: 03/04/2025
Total: $500

rationale: Day-first per US convention (no Russian/Armenian/EUR cues)

input.document:
Globex Industries
Bill to: Initech
Invoice #42
Total: $1,000

rationale: First non-cue company line wins; 'Bill to' is a skip prefix

input.document:
ACME Corp
Subtotal: $1,000
Tax (10%): $100
Total: $1,100

rationale: Must skip 'Subtotal' and 'Tax' lines, pick 'Total:' line

input.document:
ООО ТехноСтрой
Счёт № 100
от 15 марта 2025
Итого: 1 234,50 руб.

rationale: 1 234,50 → 1234.50 (space stripped, comma = decimal in ru)

input.document:
ՀայՀաշվապահ ՓԲԸ
Հաշիվ № 5
15 մարտի 2025
Ընդամենը: 50,000 ֏

rationale: 15 մարտի 2025 = 15 March 2025, ֏ = AMD, 50,000 (no decimal)

input.document:
Test Corp
Date: 03/15/25
Total: $999

rationale: 2-digit year → assume 20xx (per _RE_DATE_SLASH handler)

input.document:
Test GmbH
VAT: DE987654321
Total: EUR 500

rationale: VAT: prefix matches _RE_TAX_ID, DE+9 digits = German VAT

input.document:
ACME
Description: $1000 services
Total: $1000

rationale: Total: line wins over Description line
Empty input → all None (defensive default)

input.document:
ACME
Invoice: 2025-01-15
Subtotal: EUR 1,000
Total: USD 1,100

rationale: Currency follows the selected total (USD in this case)

input.document:

Հաշիվ-ապրանքագիր № 100
Ամսաթիվ: 1 հունվարի 2025
Ընդամենը: 100,000 դրամ

rationale: Armenian January '1 հունվարի 2025' — first month, genitive case

rationale: Armenian December '15 դեկտեմբերի 2024' — last month, prior year
